projectDescription: VidSpark is an AI-powered creative app that lets users generate images and videos from text prompts or uploaded images using Imagen and Veo AI models.
keyFeatures: AI image generation with Imagen using customizable art styles
Image-to-video animation with Veo and motion intensity controls
Text prompt-to-video generation with style and mood settings
Seamless mode switching (e.g., send generated image directly to video)
Dark-themed immersive UI with real-time loading feedback
publicApiSurface: Mode 1: Image Generator — describe image + choose art style → generate image
Mode 2: Image to Video — upload/pass image + motion description + intensity → animate video
Mode 3: Prompt to Video — describe scene + video style + mood → generate 5-8s video
Art styles: Photorealistic, Cinematic, Anime, Oil Painting, Watercolor, Dark Fantasy, Minimalist
Motion intensity options: Subtle, Medium, Dynamic
Video styles: Cinematic, Cartoon, Realistic, Abstract, Sci-Fi, Nature
Video moods: Epic, Calm, Dark, Joyful, Mysterious
Actions: Download Image, Download Video, Turn into Video, Regenerate, Start Over
